name: Web Development
description: Build the web — from pixel-perfect frontends to scalable backend APIs and distributed systems powering billions of users.

name: Data Science
description: Extract insights from massive datasets using statistics, machine learning, and powerful visualization tools to drive business decisions.

name: AI / Machine Learning
description: Build intelligent systems — from training foundation models to deploying production ML pipelines that change how people interact with technology.

name: Mobile Development
description: Create seamless native and cross-platform mobile experiences for iOS and Android used by millions of people every day.

name: Cloud & DevOps
description: Design, automate, and operate the infrastructure powering modern software — from CI/CD pipelines to multi-cloud Kubernetes deployments.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Defend systems, detect threats, and build security-first products — protecting organizations from the ever-evolving landscape of cyber attacks.
